name: automatic-pro
description: Automatic Pro is a universal profile family. Instead of bean-specific profiles, it lets taste be controlled through grind, temperature, yield, and preparation. Its key difference is adaptive behavior: using pressure and flow feedback, it adjusts phases automatically, reducing the need for manual tweaking and keeping the focus on flavor.
author: modsmthng

versions.label: v2
versions.changelog: Legacy Automatic Pro release with dose-based variants.

versions.label: vIT3_0_29_6
versions.changelog: Expanded testing build with direct, spring, adaptive, and 9 bar variants.

variants.label: 9g Direct Lever
variants.notes: Flow profile - static declining flow based main extraction, suitable for all kinds of beans and drinks (the original Automatic Pro experience). If this causes issues with a fast pressure drop, switch to one of the other variations.

variants.label: 18g Direct Lever
variants.notes: Flow profile - static declining flow based main extraction, suitable for all kinds of beans and drinks (the original Automatic Pro experience). If this causes issues with a fast pressure drop, switch to one of the other variations.

variants.label: 18g Spring Lever
variants.notes: Pressure profile - static declining pressure based main extraction, rounded flavor for an authentic Italian espresso. If the shot runs too fast, grind finer.

variants.label: 20g 9 Bar
variants.notes: Static 9 bar pressure based main extraction, good to learn what grind size, ratio, and temperature do.

variants.label: 20g Adaptive Pressure
variants.notes: Adaptive pressure based main extraction, experimental.
